name: Pretzel Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, blend the cream cheese and sugar until combined.
2. Mix the pretzels and margarine in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes; cool completely.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the cooled pretzel crust.
5. Spread the whipped topping over the cream cheese layer.
6. Dissolve the strawberry gelatin in hot pineapple juice according to package instructions.
7. Add the frozen strawberries and stir until well combined.
8. Allow the gelatin mixture to thicken, then pour it over the whipped topping.
9. Refrigerate until firm before serving.
